statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name"); base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"; if [[ "$base_url" == "https://openrouter.ai/api"* ]]; then if [[ "$model" == "anthropic/claude-fable-5"* ]] || [[ "$model" == "Fable "* ]]; then model="Fable 5 via OpenRouter"; elif [[ "$model" == "anthropic/claude-opus-4.5"* ]] || [[ "$model" == "Opus 4"* ]]; then model="Opus 4.5 via OpenRouter"; elif [[ "$model" == "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6"* ]] || [[ "$model" == "Sonnet 4"* ]]; then model="Sonnet 4.6 via OpenRouter"; elif [[ "$model" == "anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5"* ]] || [[ "$model" == "Haiku 4"* ]]; then model="Haiku 4.5 via OpenRouter"; fi; fi; user=$(whoami); branch=$(cd "$dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ] && [ ${#branch} -gt 40 ]; then branch="${branch:0:27}...${branch: -10}"; fi; dirty=""; if [ -n "$branch" ] && [ -n "$(cd "$dir" && git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then dirty=" *"; fi; pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.used_percentage | if . then (. | round | tostring) else empty end"); r5h=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage | if . then (. | round | tostring) else empty end"); r7d=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage | if . then (. | round | tostring) else empty end"); out="\033[36m${user}\033[0m :: \033[32m$(basename "$dir")\033[0m"; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then out="$out on \033[35m${branch}${dirty}\033[0m"; fi; out="$out :: \033[90m[${model}]\033[0m"; if [ -n "$pct" ]; then out="$out :: ctx→\033[33m${pct}%\033[0m"; fi; if [ -n "$r5h" ]; then out="$out :: 5h→\033[33m${r5h}%\033[0m"; fi; if [ -n "$r7d" ]; then out="$out :: 7d→\033[33m${r7d}%\033[0m"; fi; echo -e "$out"'
